item.title: With the right prompts, AI chatbots can analyze biomedical big data accurately
item.description: In an early test of how AI can be used to decipher large amounts of health data, researchers at UC San Francisco and Wayne State University found that...

item.title: Myopia is driven by how we use our eyes indoors, new research suggests
item.description: For years, rising rates of myopia—or nearsightedness—have been widely attributed to increased screen time, especially among children and young adults....

item.title: Review finds wide gaps in 'silent trials' used to test medical AI

item.title: Developmental 'switch' in brain may shape lifelong obesity risk

item.title: Why are more under-50s getting colorectal cancer? 'We don't know'
item.description: The death of US actor James Van Der Beek was just the latest reminder that colorectal cancer has been surging among people under 50 in recent years—an...
